title: Sign in and reach the dashboard
description: This test verifies that a staff user can sign in and arrive at the main dashboard with operational overview content visible.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify operational overview metrics are visible

title: Staff reaches the dashboard after signing in
description: This verifies that a staff user can sign in and land on the main dashboard with the expected operational overview.

steps.description: Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the dashboard overview is displayed

title: Staff registers a payment with a selected client and plan
description: This verifies that a staff user can complete a payment registration and see the payment recorded with receipt availability.

steps.description: Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in a valid payment amount

title: View the dashboard overview after login
description: This test verifies that a signed-in staff user can open the dashboard and see the key operational metrics used in daily work.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the dashboard overview is visible
Verify revenue, attendance, plans, and cash metrics are visible

title: Staff searches clients and sees filtered results
description: This verifies that a staff user can search for clients by name or document and see the list update to matching results.

steps.description: Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the client search field with a client name or document value
Verify the client list is filtered to matching results

title: Staff registers a new client
description: This verifies that a staff user can create a client from the clients module and see the new client added to the list.

steps.description: Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the client registration form with valid client details
Verify the new client appears in the client list

title: Staff records attendance through manual member lookup
description: This verifies that a staff user can search for a member in attendance and register a manual check-in that is confirmed on screen.

steps.description: Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Type a client ID or name into the attendance search field
Select the correct member from the search results
Verify the attendance entry is confirmed

title: Staff records attendance through QR scan when camera access is allowed
description: This verifies that a staff user can use QR scanning in attendance and see the check-in recorded after a successful scan.

steps.description: Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Allow browser camera access for QR scanning
Verify the attendance check-in is recorded

title: Staff updates an existing client record
description: This verifies that a staff user can edit an existing client and see the updated record reflected in the list.

steps.description: Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Edit the client information with valid changes
Verify the updated client record is shown in the list

title: Register a supply sale and see quantities update
description: Verifies that a staff member can record an item movement in inventory and confirm the available quantity reflects the change.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the inventory quantities are updated
Verify the new movement appears in the inventory log

title: Record a cash entry

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the description field with gym membership payment
Fill in a valid amount into the amount field
Verify the new cash movement is displayed in the register
Verify the movement is recorded as an income entry

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: This test verifies that entering invalid credentials shows an authentication error and does not sign the user in.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Verify a login error message is visible
Verify the dashboard is not displayed

title: Create a membership plan

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the plan name field with Premium Monthly
Fill in a valid cost into the price field
Verify the new plan is displayed in the plans list
Verify the plan appears with its configured duration and price
